revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初八]][[zh:正月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 8|qq=January 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[Suijō Tennō]] 1st year （{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|581 BC|en|581 BC|qid=Q244721|lt=581 BC|1=581 BC}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}}) – The 2nd Emperor of Japan, {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|qid=Q313321|lt=Suijō Tennō|1=Emperor Suizei}}, ascended the throne. * {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}} 4th year / {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Engen|1=Jianwu}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1337|en|1337|qid=Q6039|lt=1337|1=1337}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}) – In the battle of Tatarahama, [[Kitabatake Chikafusa]] set up Prince Yoritomo (later known as the Emperor after the Northern Court) in Mutsu. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1564|en|1564|qid=Q6632|lt=1564|1=1564}} {{ill|February 20|en|February 20|qid=Q2344|lt=February 20|1=February 20}}) – In the Second Battle of the Kofudai, the forces of the Later Hōjō and the Minamoto clan clashed at the Kofudai of Shimōsa, with the Hōjō emerging victorious. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7717}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|February 16|en|February 16|qid=Q2342|lt=February 16|1=February 16}}) – The province of Sendai was renamed Miyagi Prefecture.
== Births == * {{ill|Jōan (era)|en|Jōan (era)|qid=Q1194188|lt=承安|1=Jōan (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1173|en|1173|qid=Q19688|lt=1173|1=1173}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}}) – {{ill|Myōe|en|Myōe|qid=Q2026000|lt=Meiei|1=Myōe}}, a monk who restored the Hua-yen sect (died {{ill|1232|en|1232|qid=Q5418|lt=1232|1=1232}}). * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|qid=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|qid=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|qid=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}}, the 5th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|qid=Q7784|lt=1791|1=1791}} {{ill|February 10|en|February 10|qid=Q2325|lt=February 10|1=February 10}}) – {{ill|Ōtagaki Rengetsu|en|Ōtagaki Rengetsu|qid=Q3075581|lt=Ōtagaki Rengetsu|1=Ōtagaki Rengetsu}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1875|en|1875|qid=Q7764|lt=1875|1=1875}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|qid=Q6958|lt=1817|1=1817}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}}) – {{ill|Kijima Matabē|en|Kijima Matabē|qid=Q6406161|lt=Raishima Matabei|1=Kijima Matabē}}, a military official from the Chōshū Domain (died {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} {{ill|February 8|en|February 8|qid=Q2323|lt=February 8|1=February 8}}) – {{ill|Iwasaki Yanosuke|en|Iwasaki Yanosuke|qid=Q4923018|lt=Iwasaki Yanosuke|1=Iwasaki Yanosuke}}, a businessman and 2nd head of the Mitsubishi conglomerate (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1642|en|1642|qid=Q6912|lt=1642|1=1642}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) – {{ill|Anrakuan Sakuden|en|Anrakuan Sakuden|qid=Q4770474|lt=Arakawa Saku-den|1=Anrakuan Sakuden}}, a monk and literati (born {{ill|1554|en|1554|qid=Q6570|lt=1554|1=1554}}).
== Commemorations == * 正月事納め
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|7|1|9|12|8|2|1|0108|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|1月8日 (旧暦)|version=66808736|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 1월 8일]] [[ja:1月8日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月初八]]
[[ar:January 8 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月初八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月初八]] {{wikidata link|Q839348}} [[Category:Days 8 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
